name: Bladepink
short_description: A dark game in a medieval setting where you play as a wounded hero trying to survive in a world invaded by the undead.
detailed_description:
A dark game in a medieval setting where you play as a wounded hero trying to survive in a world invaded by the undead.

Your goal is to find three keys to open a portal to a safe place. To do this, you will have to explore many villages surrounded by forests, fight zombies and other monsters, collect resources, improve character characteristics, find treasure chests and potions to restore health.

Features of the game:

- Upgrade System: You have the opportunity to improve your character's characteristics with various upgrades in the store.
- Exploring the world: You will explore many villages and forests to find keys and treasures.
- Atmospheric music and sounds: Music and sound effects create a gloomy and tense atmosphere.

The control is done using the keyboard and mouse.

Get ready for dangers, battles and adventures in the world of Blade pink!
